decisions.title: Brace expansion tree
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 非AI。Bashのbrace展開を解説する純粋な数学・シェル技術記事。Wikiに追加価値なし。
decisions.body_excerpt:
# Brace expansion tree
Source: https://www.johndcook.com/blog/2026/06/27/brace-expansion-tree/
Here’s a crazy bash one-liner I found via an
article
by Peter Krumins:
echo {w,t,}h{e{n{,ce{,forth}},re{,in,fore,with{,al}}},ither,at}
This prints 30 English words:
when, whence, whenceforth, where, wherei
